title: Brig ConfigMap
description: Schema for Wire brig (user accounts service) configuration. Derived from Haskell source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs at chart/5.27.26

logNetStrings.description: Optional. Deprecated in favor of logFormat. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:417 @chart/5.27.26]

randomPrekeys.description: Optional. Enable random prekey strategy. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:392 @chart/5.27.26]

wireServerEnterprise.description: Optional. Wire Server Enterprise endpoint. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:373 @chart/5.27.26]

elasticsearch.description: ElasticSearch connection. Requires url (not host/port). [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:379 @chart/5.27.26]

url.description: ES server URL, e.g. https://elasticsearch:9200 [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:66 @chart/5.27.26]

credentials.description: File path to ES credentials [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:84 @chart/5.27.26]

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL connection as libpq key=value map. Typical keys: host, port, user, dbname, password, sslmode. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:382 @chart/5.27.26]

postgresqlPassword.description: Optional. File path to PostgreSQL password. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:383 @chart/5.27.26]

size.description: Number of connections in the pool [source: libs/extended/src/Hasql/Pool/Extended.hs:46 @chart/5.27.26]

acquisitionTimeout.description: Duration string, e.g. '30s', '5m'. Max time to wait for a connection. [source: libs/extended/src/Hasql/Pool/Extended.hs:37 @chart/5.27.26]

agingTimeout.description: Duration string. Max lifetime of a connection. [source: libs/extended/src/Hasql/Pool/Extended.hs:38 @chart/5.27.26]

idlenessTimeout.description: Duration string. Max idle time before connection is closed. [source: libs/extended/src/Hasql/Pool/Extended.hs:39 @chart/5.27.26]

email.description: Either AWS SES config (sesQueue + sesEndpoint) or SMTP config (smtpEndpoint + smtpConnType). Parser tries AWS first, then SMTP.

serversSource.description: When 'files': servers + serversV2 required. When 'dns': baseDomain required. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:289 @chart/5.27.26]

secret.description: File path to TURN shared secret [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:291 @chart/5.27.26]

tokenTTL.description: TURN credential validity in seconds [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:294 @chart/5.27.26]

configTTL.description: TURN config fetch interval in seconds [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:297 @chart/5.27.26]

sft.description: Optional. SFT (Ogg conference calling) settings. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:424 @chart/5.27.26]

setStomp.description: File path to STOMP secrets [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:442 @chart/5.27.26]

setDisabledAPIVersions.description: Array of version strings: v0..v12 or 'development' [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:551 @chart/5.27.26]

setPasswordHashingOptions.description: When algorithm=argon2id: iterations, memory, parallelism are required. When algorithm=scrypt: no additional fields. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:585 @chart/5.27.26]

inverseRate.description: Microseconds per operation; 0 = no rate limiting
